description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a red-tiled gable roof and a compact, rectangular footprint. The structure is surrounded by dense, mature trees and lush greenery, providing a sense of privacy and seclusion. The front facade features a small porch area with visible steps and a few potted plants, enhancing its welcoming appearance. Windows are arranged symmetrically on the front, with additional windows visible on the sides, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is pitched and covered with terracotta tiles, typical of traditional bungalow styles. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-urban environment, with the house nestled within a well-landscaped garden.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red-tiled gable roof, surrounded by dense trees and greenery, featuring a small front porch and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-tiled roof, main entrance, porch, and dense trees behind and to the sides.
description_view_1: Side/rear view dominated by thick foliage, with only a small portion of the bungalow's roof and wall visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house partially obscured by trees, showing the back of the roof and a single tree in the foreground.
description_view_3: Side view with the bungalow mostly hidden by trees, only the roof and a bit of the wall are visible, and a single tree stands apart.
